requirement_summary: Headlamp auto-leveling shall respond within 200 ms of pitch change
draft_content:
## Test Case TC-013

**Derived from:** REQ-SYS-052
**ASIL:** B

### Objective
Verify that drl shall dim to 30% when turn signal active.

### Preconditions
- Vehicle ignition ON
- System under test operational

### Test Steps
1. Establish initial conditions
2. Trigger event described in requirement
3. Measure response time and correctness
4. Record result

### Acceptance Criteria
- Response within specified time bound
- No diagnostic faults triggered
- Traceability link maintained

### References
- ISO 26262-3:2018, clause 5-6.4.3
- Safety goal SG-EX-01
requirement_text:
# REQ-SYS-052: Exterior lighting Safety Requirement

## ASIL Level
B

## Description
DRL shall dim to 30% when turn signal active.

## Rationale
ISO 26262-3:2018, clause 5-6.4.3 — safety goal SG-EX-01 requires exterior lighting functional safety.

## Verification Method
Back-to-back test comparing sensor input vs. actuator output.

## Traceability
- Up: REQ-SYS-051 (Exterior lighting Functional Safety Concept)
- Down: TC-SYS-052-SW (Software Integration Test)
